title: Claude Code vs Codex: Which Should You ACTUALLY Use?
summary: Austin Marchese compares Claude Code and Codex across five dimensions: user interface, technical output, design output, non-technical output, and cost/speed. He argues that the Codex vs Claude Code framing is itself the wrong question and proposes a different framework for evaluation.
